Journey through time and genres in this genre-shifting adventure! Experience multiple gaming eras as you navigate through different gameplay styles—from classic 2D exploration to fast-paced top-down shooting and card battles. Collect temporal crystals to unlock new eras, defeat enemies using genre-specific mechanics, and solve environmental puzzles. Your goal is to collect all temporal crystals and reach the final portal to restore the spacetime continuum. Adapt quickly as the game transforms around you! Test transitions between safe zones and ensure proper collision detection with walls and obstacles. Player successfully moves in all directions, collects items, interacts with objects, and navigates through different areas without getting stuck or passing through walls. Position updates are smooth and responsive. Tests optimal strategy to win the game by collecting all temporal crystals and reaching the final portal. Validates win condition and genre transition mechanics. Navigate through each genre zone efficiently: explore 2D areas to collect crystals, complete shooter segments by defeating enemies, win card battles strategically, and solve puzzles. Prioritize crystal collection and progress toward the final portal. Successfully collect all 5 temporal crystals, complete challenges in each genre zone, reach the final portal, and trigger GAME_OVER_WIN state. Game validates all progression requirements are met. Tests combat mechanics in shooter mode. Validates projectile collision, enemy behavior, and damage systems. Enter shooter zones and engage enemies using space to shoot. Test projectile accuracy, enemy movement patterns, and collision detection. Verify health system and game over on player death. Tests card battle mechanics and turn-based combat system. Validates card selection, damage calculation, and win/lose conditions. Trigger card battles by interacting with specific NPCs. Card battles initiate correctly, turn-based system works properly, damage is calculated accurately, and battles conclude with appropriate rewards or penalties based on outcome. Tests puzzle-solving mechanics and environmental interactions. Validates switch activation, door unlocking, and progression gates. Locate and activate switches in correct sequences to unlock doors. Test spatial reasoning puzzles and verify that solutions open new areas containing temporal crystals. Genre Shift Adventure

Journey through time and genres in this genre-shifting adventure! Experience multiple gaming eras as you navigate through different gameplay styles—from classic 2D exploration to fast-paced top-down shooting and card battles. Collect temporal crystals to unlock new eras, defeat enemies using genre-specific mechanics, and solve environmental puzzles. Your goal is to collect all temporal crystals and reach the final portal to restore the spacetime continuum. Adapt quickly as the game transforms around you!

Arrow Keys: Move character (in exploration/shooter modes) or navigate menu (in card battle mode) | Space: Context-sensitive action (interact with objects, shoot projectiles, play cards) | Z: Secondary action (dash in exploration mode, special ability in other modes) | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart game (return to start screen)

Genre Shift Adventure

Journey through time and genres in this genre-shifting adventure! Experience multiple gaming eras as you navigate through different gameplay styles—from classic 2D exploration to fast-paced top-down shooting and card battles. Collect temporal crystals to unlock new eras, defeat enemies using genre-specific mechanics, and solve environmental puzzles. Your goal is to collect all temporal crystals and reach the final portal to restore the spacetime continuum. Adapt quickly as the game transforms around you!

Arrow Keys: Move character (in exploration/shooter modes) or navigate menu (in card battle mode) | Space: Context-sensitive action (interact with objects, shoot projectiles, play cards) | Z: Secondary action (dash in exploration mode, special ability in other modes) | Enter: Start game | Esc: Pause/Unpause game | R: Restart game (return to start screen)
